string.name: audio_call_des
string.value: Users interact and converse with the intelligent assistant through voice.

string.name: digital_man_call_des
string.value: Interact with digital humans via video to enhance the authenticity of user experience.

string.name: visual_understanding_des
string.value: Through video interaction, the agent provides feedback by combining voice and visual input.

string.name: video_call_des
string.value: Digital humans conduct two-way video calls with users, incorporating visual understanding.

string.name: message_talk_des
string.value: Communicate directly with the agent via voice or text in a chat dialogue format.

string.name: AI_phone_call_des
string.value: The intelligent agent makes outbound calls directly to users mobile numbers via telecom carrier networks.

string.name: AI_phone_import_des
string.value: Users initiate inbound calls to the intelligent agent.

string.name: custom_agent_des
string.value: Please go to the console and scan the QR code to obtain a temporary trial token.

string.name: delay_rate_content
string.value: The latency in an AI conversation turn, measured from the moment the user finishes their last word to when the AI agent begins its first response. Note: There is a statistical failure rate for conversation latency measurements. When unavoidable dirty data occurs, the system will automatically discard the conversation latency data.

string.name: write_media
string.value: 写入公共媒体目录（如相册/下载目录）

string.name: write_usb
string.value: 写入用户目录（部分场景）

string.name: recode_content_text
string.value: "Wow, I think the skirt you are wearing today is very bright and elegant, which sets off your temperament very well. It is really beautiful. Can you tell me which store you bought such a beautiful skirt from? I want to buy one too."

string.name: push_down_open_recode
string.value: Press to start recording, release to end

string.name: call_out_success
string.value: 呼出成功，请注意接收手机来电

string.name: voiceprint_recognition_test_desc
string.value: AI only uses your voice as input, even if multiple people are speaking at the same time

string.name: ai_agent_config_emotional_desc
string.value: Used to select whether the agent timbre contains emotions

string.name: voiceprint_info_tipe_desc
string.value: Please read the following passage aloud in a quiet environment

string.name: config_interrupt_tips
string.value: Intelligently interrupt the AI robot based on sound and environment

string.name: config_audio_tone_tips
string.value: After switching tones, the AI will use the new voice in the next response

string.name: pstn_out_called_tips
string.value: Only supports mainland China mobile phone numbers

string.name: pstn_out_call_after_tips
string.value: After the experience, the system will dial the AI phone number from the called number, please check it

string.name: push_to_talk_gesture_hint
string.value: Release to send and swipe up to cancel

string.name: pstn_out_call_tips
string.value: The outgoing call is successful. Please pay attention to receiving the incoming call on your mobile phone.

string.name: token_time_lit_tips
string.value: The call has ended. The avatar or video agent call can only be experienced for 5 minutes

string.name: token_time_lit_tips_thirty
string.value: The call has ended. The audio or video agent call can only be experienced for 30 minutes

string.name: call_time_limit_dialog_message
string.value:
Your 30-minute conversation limit
  has been reached.

string.name: call_time_limit_dialog_message_five
string.value:
Your 5-minute conversation limit
 has been reached.

string.name: robot_speaking_tips
string.value: I'm Replying, Tap Screen or Speak to Interrupt Me
